title: Sony’s 'ironic' PlayStation disc decision upends gamer conventions and threatens a $7 billion resale market
summary: In 2013, Sony tweaked Xbox by showing how easy it was to share a PlayStation disc. Now, gamers say Sony has become exactly what it mocked.

title: Wall Street can wait: Why one U.S. biotech firm is listing in Hong Kong first
summary: Global biotech firms are increasingly being drawn to Hong Kong for its growing investor base and proximity to Chinese pharmaceutical partners.

title: Trump's push for American-made AI chips hits TSMC's margins
summary: The Taiwan-based chipmaker has announced $200 billion in investment into U.S. manufacturing since Trump returned to power in 2025.

title: These Japanese AI winners don’t make chips. They make toilets, glass fiber and seasoning
summary: A toilet maker, a glass fiber manufacturer and the maker of MSG have in Japan have become major beneficiaries of the AI boom.
